name: assess_change_impact
description: Assess the downstream impact of a proposed change to a requirement. Performs BFS through the traceability link graph up to 'depth' hops, then surfaces all affected requirements, related decisions, open risks and business rules. Returns a structured impact report with an overall severity score (low/medium/high/critical). Use before approving any change request.

user_id.description: User ID from session context. Always required.

requirement_id.description: ID of the requirement being changed. Required.

proposed_change.description: Plain-language description of what will change. Required.

depth.description: BFS traversal depth through the link graph. Default 2.
